data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a broad trough of low pressure, there will still be showers and thunderstorms over the coast of Guangdong tomorrow. With the trough of low pressure weakening and the subtropical ridge progressively covering the coast of Guangdong, showers will ease off gradually and the weather will become fine and very hot over the region in the following couple of days. An area of low pressure is expected to develop gradually over the seas east of the Philippines midweek this week. However, there are uncertainties in its subsequent movement and intensity. It will have a higher chance of entering the central and northern parts of the South China Sea in the latter part of this week, moving in the general direction of the vicinity of the coast of Guangdong over the weekend. It will be windy with squally showers and thunderstorms over the region, and there will be swells.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260721","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers. Showers will be heavier with squally thunderstorms in some areas at first.
